case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JULIO CESAR PEREZ VARGUEZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JULIO CESAR PEREZ VARGUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
